MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-02-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT POLARIS INDUSTRIES, INC. IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR# 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2018 Off Calendar

Mtn To Approve Prop 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Polaris Industries, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
